mapper.insert: INSERT INTO company (name, logo_url, industry, size, location, website, description, verified) VALUES (#{name}, #{logoUrl}, #{industry}, #{size}, #{location}, #{website}, #{description}, FALSE)
mapper.update: UPDATE company SET verified = #{verified} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM job WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND status != 'REMOVED'
SELECT company_id FROM company_member WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO company_member (company_id, user_id, position) VALUES (#{companyId}, #{userId}, 'Owner')
